privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, publicly available sample database from the official lerocha/chinook-database GitHub repository. It contains a real Artist table with ArtistId and Name fields, and a real Album table with AlbumId, Title, and ArtistId fields. The Album.ArtistId field has a proper foreign key constraint linking to Artist.ArtistId. The database media data is sourced from a real iTunes library, with customer/employee data manually created and sales data auto-generated. The task requires creating a master-detail form named 'ArtistDiscography' in LibreOffice Base with the Master form bound to the Artist table and the Subform bound to the Album table, linked on ArtistId. All metadata claims about table names, field names, and relationships are verified against the actual Chinook database schema.
